name: foldforge
description: FoldForge / 纸模工坊 — Turn imagination into printable paper models.

scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --reload-dir app --reload-delay 0.4 --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.test:api:e2e: cd apps/api && python -m pytest tests/integration -m e2e
